title: Consumer Lifecycle, Cancellation, Readiness, and Graceful Shutdown · Type Forensics
summary: An incident engineer receives a plausible but defective consumer registration, readiness, and shutdown state machine; preserve message identity and timing, locate the first broken ownership boundary, and retain a deterministic regression case. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in consumer registration, readiness, and shutdown state machine and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice,…
objectives: Report ready only after connection, topology, channel, prefetch, consume registration, and required dependencies are ready.
Track consumer tags and channel generations so stale cancellation, delivery, and close events cannot mutate current state.
Handle a null delivery callback and cancellation notifications as lifecycle events with cause, readiness, recovery, and ownership evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Consume Registration Readiness
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug messaging team handles case 3353 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to sequence readiness, cancellation, in-flight draining, deadline, and channel close; allow exactly one terminal acknowledgement decision owner; then raise a broker resource alarm and stop new publisher admission. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Report ready only after connection, topology, channel, prefetch, consume registration, and required dependencies are ready.

Inspect the Consume Registration Readiness trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Consume Registration Readiness.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for report ready only after connection, topology, channel, prefetch, consume registration, and required dependencies are ready. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Consume Registration Readiness, keep Consume Registration Readiness connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Shutdown Ack Policy
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-TypeScript function headed "// Evidence: rabbit-ts-shutdown-ack-policy-1w58yr" that uses case 9991 to sequence readiness, cancellation, in-flight draining, deadline, and channel close. Return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not import amqplib or Node built-ins, open sockets, contact RabbitMQ, Docker, networks, databases, or external effects, read host state, or use credentials; verify those boundaries later with the named Node 24, amqplib 2.0.1, RabbitMQ 4.3, TLS, partition, restart, load, upgrade, and production transfer gates.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Publish the incident record · Debug Shutdown Ack Policy
steps.instruction:
Write the debug evidence note for Shutdown Ack Policy: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A debug messaging team handles case 4127 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to sequence readiness, cancellation, in-flight draining, deadline, and channel close; allow exactly one terminal acknowledgement decision owner; then exhaust the retry age before the attempt count reaches its maximum. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose acknowledgement, requeue, dead-letter, or channel-close behavior for in-flight work during graceful and forced shutdown.

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Publish the incident record · Debug Shutdown Ack Policy.
steps.why: Retrieving Shutdown Ack Policy through the concrete consumer registration, readiness, and shutdown state machine case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Publish the incident record · Debug Shutdown Ack Policy, keep Shutdown Ack Policy connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Choose acknowledgement, requeue, dead-letter, or channel-close behavior for in-flight work during graceful and forced shutdown.

hints: For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Publish the incident record · Debug Shutdown Ack Policy, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Shutdown Ack Policy precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RabbitMQ and TypeScript Publish the incident record · Debug Shutdown Ack Policy, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A debug messaging team handles case 4127 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to sequence readiness, cancellation, in-flight draining, deadline, and channel close; allow exactly one terminal acknowledgement decision owner; then exhaust the retry age before the attempt count reaches its maximum. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose acknowledgement, requeue, dead-letter, or channel-close behavior for in-flight work during graceful and forced shutdown.

For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Publish the incident record · Debug Shutdown Ack Policy, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Acknowledging every in-flight message during shutdown prevents both loss and duplicates.
